entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The host plant Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp. used in the study

entities.name: ICPL 87
entities.description: A specific cultivar of pigeonpea found to be more vulnerable to most insect pests

entities.description: A specific cultivar of pigeonpea with an indeterminate genotypic character

entities.description: A web forming insect pest

entities.name: LEAF WEBBER
entities.description: An insect pest that creates webs on leaves

entities.name: LEAF FEEDING BEETLE
entities.description: An insect pest that feeds on leaves

entities.name: JASSIDS
entities.description: Sucking insect pests

entities.name: SPIDER
entities.description: Predatory organisms recorded in the pigeonpea ecosystem

entities.name: COCCINELLA TRANSVASALIS
entities.description: The ladybird beetle

entities.name: SOWING WINDOWS
entities.description: The timing of planting the crop which affects pest populations

entities.name: CLIMATIC VARIABLES
entities.description: Environmental factors that influence insect pest populations

entities.name: MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE

entities.name: SOLAR RADIATION

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the pigeonpea cultivars to resist insect pest infestation

entities.name: INSECT PEST POPULATION
entities.description: The number and density of insect pests present in the crop ecosystem
